馃搶 Third player after Deng Yaping and Zhang Yining to defend Olympic women's singles

achievements.title: 猸?Olympic Women's Singles Defense
achievements.description: Chen Meng is the third player after Deng Yaping and Zhang Yining to defend the Olympic women's singles title, winning gold at two consecutive Olympics (2020 Tokyo / 2024 Paris). She won the Women's World Cup singles title in 2020. Unfortunately, she was runner-up at two World Championships (2019 lost to Liu Shiwen, 2023 lost to Sun Yingsha), failing to complete a Grand Slam. Known for her solid defensive counter-attack and powerful forehand.
